name: ManpowerGroup Inc.
summary: Introduction and History ManpowerGroup Inc. is a global leader in innovative workforce solutions. Through our network of approximately 2,100 offices in more than 70 countries and territories, we put millions of people to work each year with our global, multinational and local clients across all major industry segments.
